overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following an eagle flying through a scenic river canyon. The bird navigates from a narrow forested gorge past a waterfall, emerging into a wide valley with railroad tracks, showcasing detailed natural environments with dynamic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested river canyon with rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: large eagle flying steadily through the canyon following the river path

entered.detail: dense coniferous forest covering the hillside
steep rock face with sparse vegetation on top
flowing river with visible current and rocks

segments.scene_description: The eagle soars through a forested river canyon with steep rocky cliffs and dense pine forests on either side. The river flows beneath as the bird maintains a steady flight path through the natural corridor.

events.description: eagle approaches and flies past a waterfall cascading down the canyon wall
canyon begins to open up into a wider valley with distant views

agents.ego_description: eagle navigating through the narrow canyon section near the waterfall

entered.detail: waterfall cascading down the rocky canyon wall into the river
vertical rock face forming the canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The eagle flies through a narrower section of the canyon where a waterfall cascades into the river below. The rocky walls close in before beginning to open up into a wider valley.

events.description: railroad tracks become visible running parallel to the river on the right bank

agents.ego_description: eagle flying over the widening river valley with railroad tracks visible along the bank

entered.detail: single track railway running parallel to the river
large willow tree with hanging branches over the water
expansive valley opening up with distant hills

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wide valley where railroad tracks run parallel to the river on the right. The landscape features grassy banks and scattered trees as the eagle continues its flight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside with railway and distant mountains

events.description: eagle gains altitude while flying over the railroad tracks and trees

agents.ego_description: eagle ascending while flying over railroad tracks and open fields, revealing expansive views

entered.detail: gentle rolling hills covered in grass and scattered trees
distant mountain range on the horizon
open grassy fields extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The eagle flies over the railroad tracks and through open countryside, gaining altitude to reveal expansive views of the valley, distant mountains, and scattered woodlands.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an eagle glides from a confined, forested river canyon into an expansive, open valley. It begins by soaring through a natural corridor of steep rocky cliffs and dense pine forests with a river flowing steadily below. As the flight path continues, the canyon walls close in around a cascading waterfall before the terrain begins to widen. The scene then opens into a broad valley where railroad tracks run parallel to the river along grassy banks and scattered trees. Finally, the camera gains altitude over the tracks and open countryside to reveal a panoramic view of distant mountains and sprawling woodlands.
